root_cause: Pod crashes after node drain due to node-specific dependency
evidence: Pod crashloop-drain-pod restarted after node drain
Timeline shows scheduling followed by CrashLoopBackOff

causes.message: Node 'node1' became unavailable or was drained
Pod was rescheduled onto a different node
New node lacks configuration required by the workload

node:node1: Node became unavailable or drained before crash loop
